name: MCP Tool Removed — Contract Break
failure_mode: A required tool (e.g. query_invoice_status) is removed from the MCP server in a new deployment.
detection: GET /capabilities returns tool list missing required tool. gate_mcp_contract_integrity fails.
remediation: 1. Restore missing tool in server.py. 2. Re-run verify_mcp_contract_integrity.py. 3. Establish contract testing in CI to prevent future regression.
